title: E2E: Poly Server via poly-web visual test

checklist.text: Make poly-server-client HTTP compile for wasm32-unknown-unknown
Gate WS module behind native feature, add wasm-http feature
Add poly-server-client to poly-core for WASM + update async_trait
Remove wasm32 gate from add_poly_server in client_manager
Build Add Account wizard UI component
Wire Create Server action in UI
Wire Create Channel action in UI
Ensure send_message works E2E for poly-server accounts
cargo check WASM + cargo cranky zero warnings
Start poly-server + poly-web and verify demo still works
Visual E2E: Add Poly Server account via Settings UI
Visual E2E: Create a server/guild in the UI
Visual E2E: Create a text channel in the UI
Visual E2E: Send a chat message and see it appear
Screenshot final result and confirm success
